hero.label: Collaborative mentorship ecosystem
hero.subtitle: We pair emerging tech leaders with seasoned mentors, a judgment-free peer community, and reflection tools built for real growth. Because no one should have to lead alone.

problems.title: New leaders often struggle with three things
problems.description: Leadership looks simple from the outside, but the reality is far more complex once you're responsible for people, decisions, and outcomes.

items.title: Nobody taught me how to lead
items.description: You were promoted because you were great at your job — not because you were trained to manage people, navigate conflict, or inspire a team.

items.title: Leadership feels lonely
items.description: Some challenges are difficult to discuss with your manager, your team, or even your friends. You need peers who truly understand the journey.

items.title: Lack of a feedback
items.description: Without structured feedback and guidance, leadership growth becomes guesswork instead of intentional development.

solutions.title: We Light the Way
solutions.description: Four pillars that turn the isolating climb into a guided, shared journey.

items.title: Mentors Who've Been There
items.description: Pairing with seasoned leaders who've navigated the same transition. Real guidance from people who get it.

items.title: A Trusted Community
items.description: A safe, judgment-free space to share wins, failures, and everything in between with peers on the same path.

items.title: Tools For Self-Leadership
items.description: A guided journey of self-reflection to uncover your unique leadership style, strengths, and values.

items.title: Bite-Sized Growth
items.description: Actionable insights on emotional intelligence, conflict resolution, and strategy for busy leaders — not another course to finish.

growTogether.title: Grow Together
growTogether.description: Growth has phases, like the moon — from mentee, to confident leader, to mentor lighting the way for the next.

phases.description: A recently promoted team lead challenged by the transition from an individual contributor to a people manager.
A confident, self-aware people manager building trust and leading with clarity and empathy.
A seasoned C-level manager interested in giving back and building a legacy by mentoring and supporting the next generation of leaders.

product.title: What We Built
product.description: One cohesive product that turns leadership growth from a feeling into something you can see and act on.

items.title: Personalized Leadership Journey
items.description: A tailored path that starts with onboarding assessments and adapts as you grow — combining curated learning, mentorship sessions, and peer support in one experience.

items.title: Mentee-Mentor Matching System
items.description: Smart matching that goes beyond surface-level pairing, factoring in leadership style, expectations, and cultural context to create relationships that actually click.

items.title: Reflective Journal
items.description: A dedicated space to build self-awareness over time — designed to help you notice even the smallest shifts in behavior and mindset.

items.title: Progress Dashboard
items.description: A visual, measurable way to track growth across strengths, leadership style, and development areas — so progress isn't just felt, it's seen.

members.name: Solomiia Rybchanska
members.bio: 6+ years in software engineering, building products that make a meaningful impact.

footer.subtitle: No one should have to lead alone. Join the leaders growing together with Ment2Lead.
